name: Chicken Drummy Refillable Catnip Cat Plush Toy Set - 2pc - Boots & Barkley™
description:
Help your feline friend get their zoomies out with the 2-Piece Chicken Drummy Refillable Catnip Cat Plush Toy Set from Boots & Barkley™. This two-piece cat toy set includes a chicken drumstick with a smiling face plus a catnip bottle to refill the toy. Made of polyester, the plush toy is great for pouncing and chasing and is suitable for cats of all ages.

Boots & Barkley™: Because pets are just the best.
